category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Bangladesh) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Bangladesh Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入孟加拉国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入孟加拉：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Bangladesh requirements: BSTI certification where in scope, BDS/IEC 62133 cell safety, BTRC type approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer route through Chattogram and Mongla ports.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与孟加拉国要求对照：适用范围内的BSTI认证、BDS/IEC 62133电芯安全、无线功能的BTRC型号核准、UN 38.3运输，以及经吉大港和蒙格拉港的本地进口商路径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與孟加拉要求對照：適用範圍內的BSTI認證、BDS/IEC 62133電芯安全、無線功能的BTRC型號核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及經吉大港和蒙格拉港的本地進口商路徑。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters selling into Bangladesh must work through an in-country importer, meet BSTI certification where the product falls within a regulated/standardised category, demonstrate cell safety to BDS/IEC 62133, obtain BTRC type approval for any wireless functions, and hold a valid UN 38.3 transport test report — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification. Unlike the EU, Bangladesh has no EU-style horizontal battery regulation, battery passport, RoHS, or EPR regime.
answer_first.zh: 向孟加拉国销售的中国锂电池及移动电源出口商，须通过本地进口商办理，在产品属于受规管/标准化类别时取得BSTI认证，按BDS/IEC 62133证明电芯安全，为任何无线功能取得BTRC型号核准，并持有有效的UN 38.3运输测试报告——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。与欧盟不同，孟加拉国没有欧盟式的横向电池法规、电池护照、RoHS或EPR制度。
answer_first.zht: 向孟加拉銷售的中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商，須通過本地進口商辦理，在產品屬於受規管/標準化類別時取得BSTI認證，按BDS/IEC 62133證明電芯安全，為任何無線功能取得BTRC型號核准，並持有有效的UN 38.3運輸測試報告——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。與歐盟不同，孟加拉沒有歐盟式的橫向電池法規、電池護照、RoHS或EPR制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator or standards-body sources (BSTI, BTRC, BSTI BDS catalogue, IEC, UNECE) preferred over secondary commentary.
